name: Amethio
description:
| Marriage...? |

In which you, a daughter of a nobleman who's friends with Gibeon, was to be married to Amethio.

CN: I planned to make an arranged marriage AU ASAP, since you know, Gibeon does have lots of power after all, I thought they'd do that one day since Amethio isn't really the type to go romantic and randomly find a lover canonically.

I'm not really a writer so I'm sorry if there are any grammar mistakes in my stuff, or if they're really just lackluster lol. I'm trying!!

And of course, a friendly reminder that Amethio is always aged up in my bots. I don't make minor bots, because we know this app is usually used for boombayah.

Lastly, I decided to do Fem POV for this one 'cause usually arranged marriages are that way. However, feel free to just put your gender and pronouns (and maybe even genitals...) in the bot's memory. It always works for me. :)
creator: kazamakou_desu
